name: omnifocus-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that integrates with OmniFocus for AI assistant interaction

scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-files && npm run build:skill && chmod 755 dist/server.js
scripts.build:skill: rm -f managing-omnifocus.skill && cd managing-omnifocus && zip -r ../managing-omnifocus.skill SKILL.md references/ assets/ scripts/ -x '*.DS_Store' 2>/dev/null; cd ..
